errors.existingEmailDesc: Email already in use, please sign in.
errors.existingUsernameDesc: Username already taken, please choose another.

zod.passwordRestriction: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter and one number
zod.passwordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long
zod.passwordMaxLength: Password cannot be more than {length} characters long
zod.passwordLowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
zod.passwordUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
zod.passwordNumber: Password must contain at least one number
zod.passwordSpecial: Password must contain at least one special character
zod.usernameLength: Username must be between 3 and 20 characters.
zod.usernameMaxLength: Username cannot be more than 20 characters.
zod.usernameInvalid: Username can only contain letters, numbers, and underscores.
zod.nameLength: Name must be between 3 and 50 characters.

New.title: Start by creating your first portfolio
New.description: Add your wallets and tokens to start tracking your crypto assets.

errors.duplicateName: A portfolio with this name already exists
errors.invalidName: Please enter a valid portfolio name
errors.unexpected: Something went wrong. Please try again

Wallets.title: My Wallets
Wallets.description: Add your wallets to start tracking your crypto assets.

form.step1Description: Choose a name and select the cryptocurrency type
form.step2DescriptionBtc: Enter your extended public key to track your Bitcoin wallet
form.extendedPublicKeyHelper: Sharing your extended public key is safe for funds, but exposes your balances and transactions, which may affect your privacy.
form.addressTypeHelper:
Choose Bitcoin address type:
• Legacy (BIP-44, starts with 1)
• Nested SegWit (BIP-49, starts with 3)
• Native SegWit (BIP-84, starts with bc1q)
• Taproot (BIP-86, starts with bc1p)

success.walletAddedDescription: {walletName} has been added to your portfolio

errors.invalidName: Please enter a valid wallet name
errors.invalidXpubFormat: Invalid extended public key format. Must be valid xpub, ypub, or zpub
errors.duplicateXpub: This wallet is already added to your portfolio
errors.duplicateName: A wallet with this name already exists
errors.unexpected: Something went wrong. Please try again

table.name: Name
table.deleteConfirmDescription: This action cannot be undone. "{walletName}" and all associated data will be permanently removed.

LandingPage.title: Track your crypto. Keep your privacy.
LandingPage.description: Kairo is a self-hosted portfolio tracker for your wallets and tokens. Your keys, your node, your data.

Metadata.title: Kairo
Metadata.description: Privacy-first web app for tracking crypto portfolios.

Dashboard.title: Portfolio balance
Dashboard.balanceChangeExplanation: Shows how your portfolio balance has changed over the selected period compared to the start.
Dashboard.unrealizedPnlExplanation: Estimated profit or loss if you sold your assets right now, calculated as the difference between your average purchase price (WAP) and the current market price.

name.title: Portfolio Name
name.description: The name used to identify this portfolio.

errors.invalidName: Please enter a valid portfolio name.
errors.duplicateName: A portfolio with this name already exists.
errors.unexpected: Something went wrong. Please try again.

currency.title: Display Currency
currency.description: All portfolio values will be displayed in this currency.

errors.unexpected: Something went wrong. Please try again.

delete.title: Delete Portfolio
delete.description: Permanently delete this portfolio and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
delete.confirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{portfolioName}"? All wallets, transactions, and data will be permanently removed.

errors.unexpected: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Transactions.title: Transactions

Transactions.noWalletsDesc: Add a wallet to start tracking your transactions.
Transactions.noTransactionsDesc: Your transactions will appear here once your wallets have activity.
